_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct qualitative and quantitative research and analysis.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.457), AB-T-009 (AB, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.492). Shared vocabulary: [analysis]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, qualitative, quantitative, research] vs WIDAI-only terms [anomaly, conducting, correlation, data, decisions, detection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.880, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Conduct qualitative and quantitative research and analysis." and "Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.460 ≈ STS 0.492 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [analysis]. DCWF-only: [conduct, qualitative, quantitative, research]. WIDAI-only: [anomaly, conducting, correlation, data, decisions, detection].
